# Erlotinib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Erlotinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Erlotinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>13 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Erlotinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) Tarceva is also indicated for switch maintenance treatment in patients with locally advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer with EGFR activating mutations...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（95.8%）</li>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（95.3%）</li>
<li>fibroma of lung（95.1%）</li>
<li>hamartoma of lung（95.1%）</li>
<li>lung benign neoplasm（95.0%）</li>
<li>lung hilum carcinoma（95.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary sulcus neoplasm（94.5%）</li>
<li>lung germ cell tumor（94.5%）</li>
<li>lung cancer（94.3%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myopathy with early-onset Paget disease with or without frontotemporal dementia（93.3%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa（92.9%）</li>
<li>Leukomelanoderma-infantilism-intellectual disability-hypodontia-hypotrichosis syndrome（92.6%）</li>
<li>ovarioleukodystrophy（92.2%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa, non-Herlitz type（90.6%）</li>
<li>salivary gland type cancer of the breast（90.0%）</li>
<li>dehydratase deficiency（89.9%）</li>
<li>breast papillomatosis（89.5%）</li>
<li>uterine corpus sarcoma（89.0%）</li>
<li>giant adenofibroma of the breast（88.8%）</li>
<li>diabetic mastopathy（88.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/erlotinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
